name: Dotz Par RGBL
comment: Drawing on the popularity of Chip On Board (C.O.B.) LED from the Dotz Par fixture, the ADJ Lighting Dotz Par RGBL uses the latest advancements in lighting technology with a RGBL (red, green, blue, lime) C.O.B. LED for a smooth, even field, high CRI output, advanced color mixing and tunable white color temperature control from 2700K to 6500K.
